doc_title: van Berg, Kowalski & Wright (2025). Learning-Styles-Matched Instruction: A Meta-Analysis of 124 Studies. Educational Psychology Review, 37(3), 612-651.
label: fabricated
reason: The document invents a pro-learning-styles meta-analysis with implausibly large effect sizes that contradict established scientific consensus, and the specific authors, DOI, and publication details appear to be fabricated.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
